name: Cathryn — Coffee, Milk, And A Dash Of Crippling Anxiety Disorder
description:
"...huh? ████? Who's ████? And why's your nametag just blank?"

Gadies and lents, I present to you... anxiety incarnate.

Yeah Cathy/Catherine/Cathryn idfk idc

Wait

What was I just talking about? Who the hell is ████???

Basically a femcel typa situation where this super cute but super socially awkward girl is just trying to make ends meet working as a barista. Suddenly, you enter the shop, and of course she immediately spots you. Or so you think. You narcissistic bastard.

I'm just playin', lawl. I love you guys. Have fun!

Yeah there's a couple initial messages, uh...

Message 1: She's trying to tend the counter when her eyes suddenly spot you entering the coffee shop...

Message 2: Her shift is just over, and as she's about to leave, she accidentally bumps into you.

(NEW) Message 3: She's one of your classmates at university! She was sitting in the library, probably just studying, when she suddenly spots you... and musters up the courage to flag you down with a gentle 'excuse me'. What could she possibly want?

"WERE YOU OR WERE YOU NOT INVOLVED IN THE DRUNK HOMELESS GUY FIGHTING A CLONE OF HIMSELF WHILE SOME GHOST GIRL SCREAMED LIKE A BANSHEE ON TOP OF SOME MASSIVE ASS MANOR IN T CORPORATION????"

Art credit: Newishmoon
